title: calathea monstera
intro: Calathea monstera, also known as Calathea musaica, is a type of ornamental plant that belongs to the Marantaceae family, characterized by its distinctive, mosaicked leaves that resemble a Monstera deliciosa. The Calathea monstera plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Calathea monstera include tea infusions and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
